hero_subtitle: SFTY structures provider outputs and case data into audit-ready evidence packages that connect customers, entities, wallets, transactions and internal compliance decisions.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens across scattered evidence
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to assemble clear and consistent evidence packages due to fragmented data from multiple providers. This complicates audit preparation and weakens traceability across customers, wallets, transactions, and cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider data, case workflows, decision logs and regulatory updates into a unified evidence layer to help compliance teams prepare consistent audit-ready packages efficiently.
workflow_title: From alerts to audit-ready case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes alerts from multiple providers into structured cases with preserved evidence and review logs to support audit preparedness and regulatory reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms scattered provider outputs into structured evidence packages and case history, enabling compliance teams to prepare audit-ready reports with clear decision traceability.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a controlled layer for evidence preservation, provider orchestration and secure deployment to support audit and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support building AML compliance evidence packages
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows preserve audit-ready compliance evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider results connect to regulatory review evidence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY supports internal governance for audit preparation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected control layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, cases and reporting into structured, auditable workflows across digital asset operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support case and evidence workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY organizes provider outputs into case files, linking customers, wallets, transactions, alerts, decisions and evidence to streamline review, escalation and reporting processes within one operational system.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision logs and case documentation with audit logs to support compliance operations remain review-ready and can demonstrate the basis for regulatory submissions or internal audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects to multiple KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into a single compliance stack without requiring replacement or disruption of existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or monitoring providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY sits above existing providers, structuring their outputs into workflows, cases, evidence and reports rather than replacing onboarding, monitoring or analytics vendors.
final_description: Review how SFTY structures provider outputs and case data into connected, compliant-ready evidence for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
